Describe the introductory text overlays and background transitions observed from the start of the video through the first step title.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white text displaying a website URL appears on a dark gradient background; at 8s, a starry night sky background fades in with partial title text; at 10s, the complete phrase 'How To Jump Rope' centers on the screen; at 12s, the background shifts to solid dark red showing 'Step 1 The Pop'.

question: Describe the appearance of the subject and the instructional text list shown immediately following the first step title card.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a red background displays the text 'Step 1 The Pop' in bold white font; at 14s, a child wearing a white shirt with a black spider graphic appears in a garage setting; at 16s, a black screen presents a bulleted list of instructions under the heading 'Teach them to...'; at 18s, the instructional list remains on screen for viewing.
